name: rubberiq
description: RubberIQ — AI-first ops platform for used tire shops (Guru Boxz Technologies LLC).

scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
